subject: [N5] 5 action items from 2025-10-27 external-david
body:
Hi V,

I extracted 5 action items from your 2025-10-27 external-david meeting (20251028-132902_Meetings).
Please review and reply with your approval:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**1. **Dual-track approach validated**: Continue strategic buyer conversations (we've mapped ~150 companies) while Ilya helps juice the B2B pipeline to create proof points**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**2. **Business broker marketplace angle**: Your James Camp / Nanoflips recommendation was a genuine blind spot for us—expanding beyond strategic acquirers to career investors who buy/renovate Internet businesses at revenue multiples**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**3. **Floor price positioning**: Your insight that covering investor returns is a legitimate negotiating floor (not a weak opener) reframed how we think about that constraint**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**4. When you get a chance, the list of broker marketplaces you mentioned would be incredibly helpful—no rush, but we'd love to explore that channel**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**5. If you're open to it, we'd love to share our "war room" acquisition target list with you—in case any jump out as companies you know or can help us get warm intros to**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**Reply with:**
• "approve all" → Push all to Akiflow
• "approve 1,5" → Push only #1 and #5
• "skip 2" → Don't create #2
• "edit 1: tomorrow 8am, 30m" → Modify then push

Or just reply "approved" and I'll push everything!

—Zo
